commit.message:
Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

commit.message:
Add NETWORK_MEASURES env option to control which measures are exported

Comma-separated setting with valid values PAGERANK, HITSHUB, HITSAUTH,
BETWEENNESS, INDEGCENTRALITY. Defaults to PAGERANK. HITS is computed once
when either HITSHUB or HITSAUTH is requested, with labels filtered to
only expose the requested sub-measures.

Fix Decap CMS auth: use /auth redirect to avoid path segments in base_url

the postMessage origin check. Use base_url as just the domain
with auth_endpoint: auth, and add Netlify redirects from /auth
and /callback to the actual function paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: deduplicate GLB materials so Three.js shares compiled shader programs

Adds client/MaterialCache.js with a global material cache keyed by all
shader-affecting properties (type, maps, roughness, metalness, etc).
After each unique GLB URL is parsed, deduplicateScene() walks its scene
graph and replaces materials with cached instances so identical materials
across different entities resolve to the same JS object reference, causing
Three.js WebGLRenderer programCache to compile each shader program once
instead of once per entity.

commit.message:
Use Vercel Blob for PDF upload to bypass 4.5MB body limit

Client uploads PDF to Vercel Blob first, then sends blob URL to
translate API. Server downloads from blob, processes, and cleans up.
Removes the 4.5MB serverless body size restriction for large PDFs.

feat(s05): implement transfer cost basis inheritance per §5

- Remove transfer_out from WITHDRAWAL_LIKE in position_computer;
  transfers are NOT realisation events — no realised P&L recorded
- Add process_transfer_out_fifo/wac methods that consume FIFO lots
  without computing gains
- Add linked_lot_id and bridge_fee_usd columns to transaction_lots
  (migration 008) for transfer_in ↔ transfer_out bidirectional linking
- Implement in-batch transfer matching by (tx_hash, amount) and
  cross-chain DB lookup with 30-minute window tolerance
- Unmatched transfer_in/out → reconstruction_status = 'partial'
- Bridge fees recorded when transfer amounts differ beyond tolerance
- Add swap detail columns for improved cost basis tracking

Add Sofle shield hardware definitions for display and RGB

Added complete Sofle shield definitions including:
- OLED display configuration (SSD1306 on I2C)

- Matrix and encoder definitions for both left and right halves
- Pin configurations for nice_nano_v2 board

This enables the display and RGB underglow to work properly.

feat(s05): add per-protocol yield computation and borrow cost tracking

Implement protocol-type-aware yield formulas per §5:
- ERC-4626 (Morpho, Yearn, Euler): share price appreciation
- Rebasing (Lido, Rocket Pool): balance growth tracking
- aToken (Aave, Compound): interest-bearing balance accrual
- Borrow cost: max(current_debt - original_borrow, 0)

swap detail columns, and expanded event scanning.

fix: repair remaining test failures across core package

  sender address from Ed25519 key and use bootstrap signing pattern
  so AddressFromSigner check passes

  from CTValidityProofSizeT1+BalanceProofSize to TransferProofRequiredSize
  (range proof is now mandatory)
- Fix FuzzResolveSenderSecp256r1Mutation: normalize secp256r1 signature
  to low-S form required by VerifyRawSignature

  uno_lifecycle_reorg_cgo_test.go

commit.message:
Add per-guide review logs to pipeline

After each guide is processed (pass, rewrite, or pause), the pipeline
writes a structured review log to review-logs/{guide-title}.md. Logs
capture per-post persona scores, reasons for sub-8 scores, rewrite
classifications, and the final result — making it easy to spot patterns
and improve the pipeline over time.

- review-logs/: new folder with .gitkeep
- generate-posts.md: Step 7 added with log format and filename convention;
  PASS and PAUSE cases updated to trigger log writing
- AGENTS.md + README.md: review-logs/ added to key files

exponential prestige growth. Now scales: base 1e12/sec, doubled

perf: fused MoE SwiGLU+GEMV decode, NVFP4 PDL registration

- Fused SwiGLU activation into MoE NVFP4 down projection GEMV,
  eliminating separate swiglu() kernel launch for gated MoE experts.
- Register all NVFP4 GEMV kernels with PDL (Programmatic Dependent
  Launch) and convert bare <<<>>> launches to pdl::launch() for
  kernel tail/head overlap in CUDA graph replay.
- Add nvfp4_gemv_pdl_register() called from GraphExecutor init.

commit.message:
#12 feat: sliding viewport with token-budget context assembly (#26)

* #12 feat: sliding viewport with token-budget context assembly

Add token-budget-based context window that walks events newest-first
and includes them until the budget is exhausted. Events are full-size
or excluded entirely — no compression.

- Add Solid Queue for background job processing (separate SQLite DB)
- Add `count_tokens` endpoint to Anthropic provider (free API)
- Add `CountEventTokensJob` to async count tokens after event creation
- Add `token_count` column to events (defaults to 0, updated by job)
- Modify `Session#messages_for_llm` with viewport logic and budget param
- Update TUI Chat to use viewport messages for LLM calls
- Heuristic fallback (4 chars/token) for events not yet counted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prepare test database schema in CI

db/schema.rb is gitignored so CI has no schema to load.
Added ActiveRecord::Tasks::DatabaseTasks.prepare_all to rails_helper
which runs migrations before specs, ensuring tables exist.

* docs: add Solid Queue and TUI startup instructions

* refactor: address self-review findings for sliding viewport PR

- Extract Event#api_role and Event#llm_message? to centralize role mapping
  (was duplicated in Session, CountEventTokensJob, and Chat screen)
- Guard schedule_token_count callback to only fire for LLM events
  (system_message, tool_call, tool_response no longer trigger wasteful jobs)
- Use atomic UPDATE WHERE token_count=0 to prevent race condition
  between parallel CountEventTokensJob instances
- Switch retry strategy to exponential backoff (:exponentially_longer)
- Fix O(n²) array building: use append+reverse instead of unshift
- Extract BYTES_PER_TOKEN constant, simplify clamp logic
- Fix misleading YARD comment (was "1 per event", actually uses heuristic)
- Reference LLM::Client::DEFAULT_MODEL in test stub instead of hardcoding
- Add specs for api_role, llm_message?, and non-LLM callback guard

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
